studyName: WES and CNV analysis of NF1-Associated Plexiform Neurofibromas

tables.description: This sample attributes data table includes body site where sample was collected, analyte type, tumor status, histological type, primary or mestastatic tumor designations, tumor grade, genotyping and sequencing centers.

variables.name: BODY_SITE
variables.description: Body site where sample was collected

variables.name: GENOTYPING_CENTER
variables.description: Name of the center which conducted genotyping

variables.name: HISTOLOGICAL_TYPE
variables.description: Cell or tissue type or subtype of sample

variables.name: PRIMARY_METASTATIC_TUMOR
variables.description: Primary tumor, metastasis, or transformed cell line

variables.name: SEQUENCING_CENTER
variables.description: Name of the center which conducted sequencing

tables.description: The pedigree data table contains family relationships in the format of family IDs, subject IDs, father IDs, mother IDs, subject's sex, and twin IDs for monozygotic twins.

variables.name: TWIN_ID
variables.description: Twin ID for monozygotic twins or multiples. A TWIN_ID is not provided for dizygotic twins or multiples.

tables.description: This subject sample mapping data table includes a mapping of study subject IDs to sample IDs. Samples are the final preps submitted for genotyping, sequencing, and/or expression data. For example, if one patient (subject ID) gave one sample, and that sample was processed differently to generate 2 sequencing runs, there would be two rows, both using the same subject ID, but having 2 unique sample IDs. The data table also includes sample aliases and sample use.

variables.name: SAMPLE_USE
variables.description: Sample use. Array_SNP: SNP genotypes obtained using standard or custom microarrays; Seq_DNA_WholeExome: Whole exome sequencing

variables.name: SOURCE_SAMPLE_ID
variables.description: Sample ID used in the Source Repository

tables.description: This subject consent data table contains subject IDs, consent group information, and affection status for NF1-associated plexiform neurofibroma (PN).

variables.name: AFFECTION_STATUS
variables.description: Case control status of the subject for NF1-associated plexiform neurofibroma (PN)

variables.name: CONSENT
variables.description: Consent group as determined by DAC

tables.description: This subject phenotype data table includes sex of subject and age when routine debulking/cosmetic surgery was performed.

variables.name: age_at_surgery
variables.description: Age of participant when routine debulking/cosmetic surgery was performed
